title: What to Know About the SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 关于 SpaceX 首次公开募股需要了解什么
summary: Elon Musk gave the financial world a lot to ponder as SpaceX made public its plans for an initial public offering. The IPO is poised to be the largest stock-market debut in history, but as financial paperwork unveiled on May 20 confirmed, SpaceX’s success as a public enterprise will depend on its ability to meet lofty goals across space exploration, satellite communications and artificial intelligence.

title: Lone Star Weighs Sale of Lender IKB After Nearly 20 Years

title: Workday Rallies After Results Quiet Fears of AI Disruption
title_cn: 业绩公布后工作日反弹，平息了对人工智能颠覆的担忧

title: US Races to Create Domestic Rare Earths Supply
title_cn: 美国竞相创造国内稀土供应
summary: Tripp Hornick, principal at Quince Street Strategy, said that the US allowed the mining and manufacturing of rare earth elements to be pushed overseas because investors felt it was too expensive and 'dirty' to back. Now, the US is facing the consequences of moving that supply chain process overseas, as the US and other world powers race to build a system that is not reliant on China for minerals that are key to national security.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UBS Hits Back Over Nazi-Accounts Probe Amid Senate Pressure

summary: Bitcoin’s bad stretch of ETF outflows has exposed an uncomfortable dynamic in the crypto market’s structure: the price level that should draw buyers back in is the one that also prompts some of the heaviest selling.

title_cn: Bird Construction 准备首次公司债券发售
summary: Bird Construction, a Canadian building firm recently named the lead construction partner for a data center in Saskatchewan, is looking to sell bonds for the first time, and aims to raise around C$250 million ($181 million), according to people with knowledge of the matter.

summary: US stocks finished the day flat, paring earlier losses as bond yields and oil prices drifted lower on hopes for a peace settlement in the Middle East, and as investors piled into old-economy stocks.

title_cn: 随着交易的加速，私人信贷的不可思议变成了现实
summary: Private credit managers are increasingly turning to the once-unthinkable: Trading in and out of loans to dump troubled assets and hunt for bargains amid the industry’s first stress test after years of breakneck growth.

summary: Oil extended declines for a third day as investors speculated on whether the US and Iran are closing in on a peace deal that could lead to a resumption of flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: Has the NYC Ferry Righted the Ship?
title_cn: 纽约渡轮已经把船摆正了吗？
summary: Since its 2017 launch, the NYC Ferry has been scrutinized over its finances. But lately, the city-run fleet says it’s seeing record ridership, social media buzz and its lowest subsidy-per-rider yet.  (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Gold erased losses as hopes of a US-Iran ceasefire deal eased bets that central banks may need to keep interest rates higher for longer to combat inflation.

summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond President Tom Barkin said the ability of businesses and consumers to tolerate the latest in a series of supply shocks will determine whether the US central bank can continue to “look through” higher inflation without raising interest rates.

title: Inflation Fears Weigh On Economic Data, Gold Declines | Bloomberg Markets 5/21/2026
title_cn: 通胀担忧令经济数据承压，金价下跌彭博市场 2026 年 5 月 21 日
summary: "Bloomberg Markets" follows the market moves across every global asset class and discusses the biggest issues for Wall Street. Today's guests: KPMG Chief Economist Diane Swonk, Advisors Capital Management Portfolio Manager & Partner JoAnne Feeney, RockCreek Co-Chief Investment Officer Alifia Doriwala, and Tabor Asset Management Research Director, Consumer Sector Head Laura Champine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mortgage Rates Hit Highest Since August as War Fans Inflation
title_cn: 战争助长通货膨胀，抵押贷款利率创八月以来新高
summary: Diane Swonk, Chief Economist at KPMG joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." US mortgage rates surged this week to the highest level since August, threatening a spring selling season that was just starting to get a pulse. The average rate for 30-year fixed loans jumped to 6.51% from 6.36%, the biggest weekly increase since the end of March, Freddie Mac reported on Thursday.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Walmart Stock is Rich: Champine
title_cn: 沃尔玛股票很丰富：Champine
summary: Laura Champine, director of research, consumer sector head at Tabor Asset Management, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets. Walmart warned rising fuel costs are squeezing the company’s bottom line and could lead to higher prices for shoppers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Risks Keep Multiplying: Doriwala
title_cn: 市场风险不断成倍增加：Doriwala
summary: Alifia Doriwala, co-chief investment officer at RockCreek, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." A standoff between the US and Iran over key issues lifted oil prices, dragging down stocks and bonds on concern that a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could worsen energy disruptions and fuel inflation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spacex’s IPO & the Future of the AI Build-Out | The Close 5/21/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 的 IPO 和人工智能建设的未来 |收盘价 2026 年 5 月 21 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Gerber Kawasaki Investment Management’s Ross Gerber, 1789 Capital Partner Paul Abrahimzadeh, Space Capital Founder & CEO Chad Anderson, Research Affiliates Director of Research Campbell Harvey, Man Group’s Matt Rowe, Coresight Research Founder & CEO Deborah Weinswig, RXO CEO Drew Wilkerson, Advanced Machine Intelligence Executive Chair Yann LeCun & Bioptimus Co-Founder & CEO Jean-Philippe Vert, & New York City Comptroller Mark Levine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Netflix, Spotify to Face Higher Costs Under New Canada Rules
title_cn: 加拿大新规下 Netflix 和 Spotify 将面临更高成本
summary: Canada will require streaming giants including Netflix Inc. and Spotify Technology SA to spend 15% of their annual Canadian revenue on local content, moving ahead with rules that have been identified as a trade irritant by the US Trade Representative.

title: The Next Phase of Artificial Intelligence
title_cn: 人工智能的下一阶段
summary: Yann LeCun & JP Vert discuss artificial intelligence and LLMs, and how they can translate into the physical world in the future. The two talk about the new techniques and infrastructures that will need to be built, as well as where some of the physical AI components can be built. They speak with Roman Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IBM Shares Soar on US Funding for $2 Billion Quantum Push
title_cn: IBM 因美国资助 20 亿美元量子推动股价飙升
summary: The Trump administration has agreed to award $1 billion to International Business Machines Corp. to build a foundry for producing quantum computing chips, part of a broad strategy to bolster US leadership in an emerging industry.

title: Take-Two Confirms November Debut for ‘Grand Theft Auto VI’
title_cn: Take-Two 确认《侠盗猎车手 VI》将于 11 月首映
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. confirmed a Nov. 19 release date for Grand Theft Auto VI, assuaging fears that what’s expected to be one of the top-selling video games of all time might be delayed again.

title: Zoom Sales Forecast Tops Estimates After Product Expansion
title_cn: 产品扩展后 Zoom 销售预测超出预期
summary: Zoom Communications Inc. projected stronger-than-anticipated sales growth, suggesting that customers are adopting its expanded suite of office products.

title: Nvidia Tells Skeptical Investors AI Is Ready to Go Mainstream
title_cn: 英伟达告诉持怀疑态度的投资者人工智能已准备好成为主流
summary: Nvidia Corp., facing more investor skepticism, used its latest quarterly report to tout progress in diversifying the company, which aims to rely less on the giant data center operators that have fueled its runaway growth.

title: Nvidia's Competitors Should Be Scared, Ross Gerber Warns

summary: Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and Investment Management co-founder and CEO Ross Gerber sees a really exciting time for tech as space and AI converge. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NYC Private School Bids $20 Million on Bankrupt Peer’s Home
title_cn: 纽约市私立学校出价 2000 万美元收购破产同伴的住宅
summary: Nearly a year after Manhattan Country School went bankrupt and closed, its former campus has found a potential buyer in an up-and-coming school that offers what it refers to as a Classical Christian education.

title: The AI-Voice Startup Angling to Give Audiobooks Their Viral Moment
title_cn: 人工智能语音初创公司希望让有声读物走红
summary: ElevenLabs is taking on Spotify and Audible in a looming battle over becoming the go-to platform for audiobooks

title: Meta Settles School Suit Over Social Media, Averting Trial
title_cn: Meta 就社交媒体引发的学校诉讼达成和解，避免了审判
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. reached an agreement to settle a landmark lawsuit alleging that addiction to Instagram and other top social media platforms upended learning across America and pushed US public schools to spend enormous resources fighting a mental health crisis.

title: SpaceX Challenges AI Rivals For Control of $26.5 Trillion AI Market
title_cn: SpaceX 向人工智能竞争对手发起挑战，争夺 26.5 万亿美元人工智能市场的控制权
summary: Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company is effectively basing its pitch for the biggest IPO in history on the idea that it can capture a huge share of the market from the likes of OpenAI, Anthropic PBC and Alphabet Inc.’s AI systems: technology that will eventually automate large swaths of white-collar and administrative work, creating a massive market for software that can perform digital tasks traditionally handled by humans. Nancy Tengler, Laffer Tengler Investments joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the flurry of IPO's. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Aims to Build 10-Gigawatt Solar Factory Near Austin
title_cn: SpaceX 计划在奥斯汀附近建造 10 吉瓦太阳能工厂
summary: SpaceX is planning to build a massive, 10-gigawatt solar manufacturing facility near Austin as part of Elon Musk’s ambition to power artificial intelligence data centers in space.

title: Musk Taps SpaceX’s Financial Power to Cut Interest Costs in Half
title_cn: 马斯克利用 SpaceX 的财务实力将利息成本削减一半
summary: Elon Musk’s reshaping of SpaceX, xAI and X into a tightly-bound conglomerate has already yielded a significant financial windfall: nearly $1 billion in annual interest savings.

title: Waymo Suspends Service in Atlanta as Robotaxis Stumped by Floods
title_cn: 机器人出租车遭遇洪水，Waymo 暂停亚特兰大服务
summary: Waymo has temporarily halted service in Atlanta over concerns that its robotaxis may attempt to drive on flooded roads, the latest setback over an issue that recently led the company to recall thousands of vehicles.

title: Kalshi Is Raising Fresh $200 Million in Latest Funding Round
title_cn: Kalshi 在最新一轮融资中筹集了 2 亿美元新资金
summary: Kalshi Inc. is raising an additional $200 million, broadening a funding round that had already brought in $1 billion, according to a person familiar with the situation.

title: Pentagon Tests Rival AI Models in Race to Replace Anthropic
title_cn: 五角大楼测试竞争对手的人工智能模型以取代人类模型
summary: The Pentagon is testing artificial intelligence models to see which are most favored by 25 of the department’s “power users,” as the US military races to find alternatives to Anthropic PBC’s Claude, according to a senior defense official.

title: SpaceX Files for Nasdaq IPO | Bloomberg Tech 5/21/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 提交纳斯达克 IPO 申请彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 21 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down SpaceX pitching a $28.5 trillion opportunity, from AI to Mars, ahead of an all-time blockbuster IPO. Plus, Nvidia fails to reignite the AI trade as CEO Jensen Huang pushes to diversify the chipmaker, saying AI is set to go mainstream. And, another major IPO on the horizon with OpenAI preparing for a filing which could come as soon as Friday. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Oura Health Oy, a maker of smart rings that track health, fitness and sleep, filed confidentially for a US initial public offering as it looks to capitalize on the growing popularity of wearable devices.

title: Spotify Shares Surge on New Music Licensing Deal, Concert Ticket Perks

summary: New co-CEOs outline ambitious plans for growth over the next four years at their first investor day.

title: SpaceX IPO Requires a Leap of Faith in AI, Musk and Mars
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股需要对人工智能、马斯克和火星的信心飞跃
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX pulled back the curtain on a business empire that has racked up ballooning losses and debt after acquiring a cash-hungry startup, and pumping billions of dollars into futuristic endeavors ranging from AI to a Mars rocket.

title: The Startups Building on Nvidia Compute
title_cn: 基于 Nvidia 计算的初创公司
summary: A part of Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's latest message to investors is that Nvidia isn't just selling chips to Big Tech anymore: it's supplying the picks and shovels for an AI gold rush, where startups are building everything from AI agents to humanoid robots and robotaxis on Nvidia compute. One of the key backers of that ecosystem is Sarah Guo, founder of AI-native venture firm Conviction. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia's Investing Strategy Is 'Smart', Says T. Rowe Price's Wang
title_cn: T. Rowe Price 的 Wang 表示，Nvidia 的投资策略是“明智的”
summary: Nvidia aims to rely less on giant data center operators and predicts other businesses and governments will become a bigger source of revenue for its chips and computing products to support AI ambitions. Tony Wang, portfolio manager of the T. Rowe Price Science and Technology Fund, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Filing 'Aspirational,' Says Piper Sandler's Webster
title_cn: Piper Sandler 的韦伯斯特表示，SpaceX 的 IPO 申请“充满抱负”
summary: SpaceX's S-1 filing asks investors to believe in three things: AI in space, a million people on Mars, and Elon Musk's ability to make it all happen. Lauren Webster, Piper Sandler's head of technology investment banking, joins Ed Ludlow to discuss if investors can bet on a future that doesn't fully exist yet on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oaktree Finds `Boring Is Beautiful' Winners in Credit
title_cn: 橡树资本发现“无聊即美丽”的获奖者
summary: Danielle Poli, co-portfolio manager for global credit at Oaktree Capital Management, says a cautious approach to credit investing still provides opportunities for tempting yields. She speaks with Dani Burger and Matthew Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Smart Ring Maker Oura Files Confidentially for IPO
title_cn: 智能戒指制造商 Oura 秘密提交 IPO 申请
summary: Oura Health Oy filed confidentially for a US initial public offering, according to a person with knowledge of the matter. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Markets." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Shows AI Opportunity Extends Beyond Hyperscalers
title_cn: Nvidia 展示 AI 机会不仅仅限于超大规模企业
summary:
Hyperscalers’ capex boom is closely watched as the ultimate barometer of how long the AI cycle lasts. Nvidia’s earnings show demand broadening and rising faster elsewhere, reducing chipmakers’ overdependence on mega-cap tech.
Ivan Feinseth, CIO at Tigress Financial, recaps Nvidia earnings and discusses his outlook on the broader sector as some big tech IPOs loom. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Retook Territory After Hobbling Starlink, Pentagon Says
title_cn: 五角大楼称，乌克兰在破坏星链后重新夺回领土
summary: A Ukrainian offensive against Russia earlier this year retook about 400 square kilometers after thousands of portable Starlink internet terminals operated by Russian forces were deactivated, according to the US Defense Intelligence Agency.

title: House Leaders Cancel Iran War Vote Amid GOP Absences
title_cn: 众议院领导人在共和党缺席的情况下取消伊朗战争投票
summary: House Republican leaders abruptly canceled a vote on the Iran war as GOP absences threatened an embarrassing defeat for President Donald Trump.

title: World Bank Says It Backs Bolivia’s Reform Agenda Amid Protests
title_cn: 世界银行表示支持玻利维亚在抗议中的改革议程
summary: World Bank Group said on Thursday that it remains supportive of Bolivia’s reform agenda, as social protests spread across the country and the government announced a cabinet reshuffle.

title: Trump Will Deploy 5,000 US Troops to Poland in Abrupt U-Turn
title_cn: 特朗普将突然掉头向波兰部署5000名美军
summary: President Donald Trump said he would send an additional 5,000 troops to Poland, reversing course on a plan to suspend an Army deployment to the country amid a feud with other NATO nations over what he saw as their refusal to help in the Iran war.

title: DHS Renews Threat to Cut Airport Customs in Certain Cities
title_cn: 国土安全部再次威胁要削减某些城市的机场海关
summary: The US Department of Homeland Security has threatened to curtail customs processing at airports in so-called sanctuary cities in order to bring them in line with the Trump administration’s immigration policies.

title: Serbia’s Vucic Seeks Early Election in Fall in Protest Response
title_cn: 塞尔维亚武契奇寻求秋季提前大选以应对抗议
summary: Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic said he plans to call an early election to be held between late September and mid-November as he confronts more than a year of anti-government protests.

title: States Seek Live Nation-Ticketmaster Breakup After Antitrust Win
title_cn: 反垄断胜诉后，各州寻求 Live Nation 与 Ticketmaster 分手
summary: Live Nation Entertainment Inc. should be required to divest its Ticketmaster unit to fix its illegal monopolization of the live music industry, state attorneys general told a court Thursday.

title: SpaceX, OpenAI Compete For Control in IPO Frenzy | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/21/2026
title_cn: SpaceX、OpenAI 争夺 IPO 狂潮中的控制权彭博商业周刊日报 5/21/2026
summary: Today, Katy Kaminski, chief research strategist and portfolio manager at AlphaSimplex Group on the bond market as inflation fears and oil prices have sent rates higher. Then, Nancy Tengler. CEO anmd CIO of Laffer Tengler Investments on recent slate of new tech IPOs as SpaceX and OpenAI take the first steps to public trading and fight for future AI market control. Plus, Jennifer Welch, Bloomberg Economic chief geoeconomics analyst, breaks down the latest from the MidEast as Iran seeks to enact a toll on ships going through the Strait of Hormuz. Finally, Gautam Bhandai co-founder, managing partner & global CIO at I Squared talks alternative investments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Fixing the UK Is So Hard
title_cn: 为什么修复英国如此困难
summary:
Keir Starmer’s 2024 landslide became a sinkhole in under two years. Bloomberg Originals explains how British politics collided with economic reality, fueling a revolving door of prime ministers.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Urged by Allies to Give New Fed Chair Warsh Breathing Room
title_cn: 盟友敦促特朗普给新任美联储主席沃什喘息的空间
summary: Persistent inflation may make it harder for the central bank to quickly cut rates.

title: Iraq Set to Jointly Probe Drone Strikes on UAE and Saudi Arabia
title_cn: 伊拉克将联合调查无人机袭击阿联酋和沙特阿拉伯的事件
summary: Iraq formed a high-level committee to investigate drone attacks on the United Arab Emirates and Saudi Arabia, as the new Iraqi prime minister appears to align with US President Donald Trump’s goal of limiting Iran’s influence in the OPEC nation.

title: How Trump's ‘Rigged’ Trend Divided the US
title_cn: 特朗普的“被操纵”趋势如何分裂美国
summary: Tell Americans long enough that everything is rigged, and they’ll be less likely to engage with the system itself, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist David M. Drucker. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Progress in Iran Talks Undercut Over Uranium, Hormuz Tolls
title_cn: 伊朗谈判的进展削弱了铀矿和霍尔木兹海峡的通行费
summary: Iran said the latest proposal from the US partly bridged the gap between the warring sides but comments from the Islamic Republic’s Supreme Leader about keeping Tehran’s uranium stockpile and a dispute over tolls in the Strait of Hormuz clouded the outlook for a breakthrough.

title: Why Critics Call Trump’s $1.8B Anti-Weaponization Fund an Abuse of Power
title_cn: 为什么批评者称特朗普的 1.8B 美元反武器化基金滥用权力
summary: The US Justice Department on May 18 struck a deal with President Donald Trump to create a $1.77 billion legal fund to pay alleged victims of government “weaponization,” an unusual agreement that could result in millions of dollars in taxpayer money being doled out to Trump’s allies and supporters.

title: Pentagon Doubts Over Rare Earths Deal Provoke White House Clash
title_cn: 五角大楼对稀土交易的怀疑引发白宫冲突
summary: The Pentagon is weighing whether to scrap an $80 million conditional loan offer to rare-earths refiner ReElement Technologies Corp., touching off a clash with the White House over an agreement that was meant to help break China’s chokehold on critical minerals.

title: GOP Nears $1 Billion Midterms War Chest, More Than Triple Democrats’ Cash
title_cn: 共和党中期选举战争基金接近 10 亿美元，超过民主党现金的三倍
summary: President Donald Trump and his Republican allies have amassed a $939 million war chest ahead of November midterms, more than tripling the Democrats’ haul and setting them up to mount a formidable fight in their uphill effort to retain control of Congress.

title: Trump Fund Faces GOP Backlash | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/21/2026
title_cn: 特朗普基金面临共和党强烈反对|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 21 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Kailey Leinz and Tyler Kendall discuss the latest from Capitol Hill. On today's show, former Republican Congressman Patrick McHenry, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, ROKK Solutions Partner Kristen Hawn and Republican Senator Shelley Moore Capito. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s $1.8 Billion Settlement Fund Hits Senate GOP Backlash
title_cn: 特朗普18亿美元和解基金遭到参议院共和党强烈反对
summary: Senate Republicans pushed back on President Donald Trump’s $1.8 billion account to pay political allies alleged to be victims of government “weaponization,” a dramatic setback for the president that defied his threats to vanquish perceived political foes within his own party.

title: Protesters Yell ‘USA Go Home’ Outside New Consulate in Greenland
title_cn: 抗议者在格陵兰新领事馆外高喊“美国回家”
summary: The opening of a new US consulate in Greenland’s capital sparked protests on Thursday, as residents voiced concerns about President Donald Trump’s designs on the island.

title: Trump Delays EPA Refrigerant Limits in Affordability Push
title_cn: 特朗普推迟 EPA 制冷剂限制以推动可负担性
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s easing requirements on planet-warming refrigerants, touting the move as a way to cut costs for consumers as he looks to address voters’ affordability concerns before November midterms.

title: The Economic Impact of Gerrymandering
title_cn: 不公正划分选区的经济影响
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, Stacey Vanek Smith and economist Julianne Malveaux talks about the economic impact of politicians trying to redistrict America ahead of midterms. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Postpones Signing AI Security Order Over Parts He Disliked
title_cn: 特朗普推迟签署他不喜欢的部分人工智能安全令
summary: President Donald Trump said he called off the signing of an executive order that would address cybersecurity concerns raised by powerful new artificial intelligence models because he objected to parts of the directive, casting doubt on US efforts to respond to new risks posed by the emerging technology.

title: Iran Has Destroyed Roughly $1 Billion Worth of US Reaper Drones
title_cn: 伊朗摧毁了价值约 10 亿美元的美国“收割者”无人机
summary: Iran has destroyed more than two dozen MQ-9 Reaper drones operated by US forces since the war began, a significant loss worth nearly $1 billion that represents 20% of the Pentagon’s prewar inventory for the hard-to-replace unmanned system.

title: India-Africa Summit Postponed Indefinitely Over Ebola Outbreak
title_cn: 印度-非洲峰会因埃博拉疫情无限期推迟
summary: An India-Africa summit due to begin in New Delhi at the end of May has been postponed indefinitely because of concerns about the Ebola outbreak.

title: Iran Looks at Setting Up Permanent Hormuz Toll System
title_cn: 伊朗考虑建立永久性霍尔木兹收费系统
summary: Iran is discussing with Oman how to set up a permanent toll system to formalize its control of maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump says he wants the waterway open and free. Bloomberg's Jeff Mason has the latest from the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Trump’s Cuba Grudge Threw a 99-Year-Old Mining Company Into Turmoil
title_cn: 特朗普的古巴恩怨如何让一家拥有 99 年历史的矿业公司陷入混乱
summary: Facing a crisis after the US expanded sanctions on Cuba, Sherritt International may now be rescued by a former adviser to the president.

title: Turkey Court Unseats Opposition Head, Triggering Market Rout
title_cn: 土耳其法院罢免反对党领袖，引发市场暴跌
summary: A Turkish court removed the leader of the country’s main opposition party, in a landmark ruling that led to a stock market selloff and state intervention to defend the lira.
